calendar.matters:
PETITION TO ESTABLISH FACT OF BIRTH
Off Calendar Feb-05-2018 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

The following matters were heard: PES-17-301497 In Re: Laylanas Shehab-Eddin Elmarouk and PES-17-301498 In Re: Muhammad Al-Haqq Shehab-Eddin Elmarouk.

Appearances: Maya Moksha in Propria Persona.
Blanca Harris also present.

Ms. Moksha provided proposed orders for both matters. The Court stated that the certificate from the Midwife establishes the date and time of birth of Laylanas, but the statement from Ms. Moksha's Mother for Muhammad does not. Ms. Moksha stated that she has a new statement from her Mother. Ms. Harris stated that she was with her Daughter when her Grandson was born. The Court granted the Petition to Establish Fact of Birth of Laylanas (subject to review of the order). The Petition to Establish Fact of Birth of Muhammad is taken under submission subject to filing of the declaration.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: V. Jung. Not reported.
